executives.name: David Burritt
executives.background: Mr. Burritt was named President and Chief Executive Officer in May 2017. He joined U. S. Steel in September 2013 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to that, he served as Chief Financial Officer at Caterpillar Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Jessica Graziano
executives.background: Ms. Graziano was appointed Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in August 2022. Before joining U. S. Steel, she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of United Rentals, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: James Bruno
executives.background: Mr. Bruno was appointed Senior Vice President - European Solutions and President of U. S. Steel Košice in 2018. He joined the company in 2014.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President - European Solutions and President of U. S. Steel Košice
Senior Vice President – Automotive Solutions; President – U. S. Steel Košice; Executive Vice President, Business Development

executives.name: Duane Holloway
executives.background: Mr. Holloway was appointed Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Ethics & Compliance Officer in April 2018. He previously served as Executive Vice President and General Counsel at Ascena Retail Group, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Ethics & Compliance Officer
SVP, General Counsel, Chief Ethics & Compliance Officer, Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Scott Buckiso
executives.background: Mr. Buckiso was appointed Senior Vice President and Chief Manufacturing Officer in 2021. He has held various leadership roles since joining the company in 1990.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Manufacturing Officer
Senior Vice President / Chief Manufacturing Officer, North American Flat-Rolled (NAFR)

executives.name: Andrea Ayers
executives.background: Former President and Chief Executive Officer of Convergys Corporation.

executives.name: David Sutherland
executives.background: Retired President and Chief Executive Officer of IPSCO, Inc. He has served as Chairman of the Board of U. S. Steel since 2014.

executives.name: Jeh Johnson
executives.background: Partner at Paul, Weiss, Rifkind, Wharton & Garrison LLP and former U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security.

executives.name: John Donovan
executives.background: Former CEO of AT&T Communications, LLC. He has served on our board since September 2021.

executives.name: John Surma
executives.background: Retired Chairman and CEO of United States Steel Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: CEO and Chairman of the Board

executives.name: Muriel Penicaud
executives.background: Former Ambassador and Permanent Representative of France to the OECD and former Minister of Labour for France.

executives.name: Paul Mascarenas
executives.background: Paul A. Mascarenas has served as a director since 2014. He previously served as Chief Technical Officer and Vice President of Ford Motor Company.

executives.name: Tracy Atkinson
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President of State Street Corporation.
